processParameters.substrate: Si(100) wafer with a resistivity of 1-5 Ω·cm and a native silicon oxide layer (~2 nm)

otherAspects.safety: Handling of organozinc precursors and H2S/H2O requires careful management due to their toxicity and flammability.
